case_title: TERI ALLEN VS. LAMBERT J. STUMPEL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $661.00 FILED BY ALLEN, TERI AS TO DEFENDANT STUMPEL, LAMBERT J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE BY SUBSTITUTED SERVICE **NO MAILING DATE ON PROOF OF SERVICE** AS TO DEFENDANT STUMPEL, LAMBERT J.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-01-1920, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT STUMPEL, LAMBERT J.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-01-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-28-2011 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PROOF OF SERVICE FILED IS INCOMPLETE - NO MAILING DATE INDICATED FOR SUB-SERVICE. BESAMAT HERNANDEZ APPEARS ON BEHALF OF THE DEFENDANT - UNABLE TO WAIVE SERVICE ON HIS BEHALF. JUDGE PRO TEM: AL ANOLIK. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALLEN, TERI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STUMPEL, LAMBERT J. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-28-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-28-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-28-2011 - JUDGMENT.
